research_basis: Culinary arts, chemistry of baking, sensory development, nutrition science, cultural dessert traditions

metadata.research_alignment: Culinary arts including traditional desserts from multiple cultures, chemistry of baking reactions (Maillard, caramelization, leavening, emulsification), sensory development in taste and texture perception, nutrition science, food history and cultural traditions, molecular gastronomy for advanced audiences, mathematical and computational models for theoretical audiences

coverage_details.kids_4_under: Sensory vocabulary, basic ingredients, simple baking tools, flavor and color recognition, tactile experiences
coverage_details.kids_10_under: Recipe ratios, international cake traditions, measurement concepts, chemistry of basic baking reactions, texture development
coverage_details.teenagers: Advanced baking science, molecular reactions, water activity, sensory perception mechanisms, global culinary traditions
coverage_details.adults: Food history, cultural studies, thermodynamics, social meanings of cakes, scholarly perspectives on food systems
coverage_details.no_humanity: Mathematical models, quantum mechanics applications, computational methods, theoretical frameworks for baking science
